Package com.csl.intercom.dbapi

Class DbapiHandlerForCSLScan

java.lang.Object
com.csl.intercom.dbapi.DbapiHandlerForCSLScan
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class DbapiHandlerForCSLScan extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Manage HTTP communications with DB-API. Provides an interface for retrieving the devices, connections and so on, and to send information to it (CPE Items, a Scan's status, ...).

    • close

      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable

    • insertAlert

      public String insertAlert(IAlertDescriptor alert)
      Insert a new alert into DB
      Parameters:
      alert - alert to insert
      Returns:
      the content of the response

    • sendCpeItems

      public void sendCpeItems(List<CpeItem> cpeItems, ScanEntity scan, boolean hasMore) throws Exception
      Send a list of CPE Items to DB-API
      Parameters:
      cpeItems - A with the CPE Items to send
      Throws:
      Exception - If any item failed

    • sendMicrosoftKbs

      public void sendMicrosoftKbs(List<MicrosoftKB> KBs, ScanEntity scan) throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getCpeItemsLastUpdateDate

      public OffsetDateTime getCpeItemsLastUpdateDate() throws Exception
      Fetch the last updated date of CPE Items in DB-API.
      Returns:
      The last update of CPE-Items in DB-API.
      Throws:
      Exception - If it was not possible to fetch from DB-API or the format was not recognised.

    • getMicrosoftKbsLastUpdateDate

      public OffsetDateTime getMicrosoftKbsLastUpdateDate() throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException, TimeoutException
      Fetch the last updated date of Microsoft KBs in DB-API.
      Returns:
      The last update of Microsoft KBs in DB-API.
      Throws:
      ExecutionException - If the fetch failed.
      InterruptedException - If the connection with DB-API was interrupted.
      TimeoutException - If the connection with DB-API times out.

    • getDevicesSince

      public List<Device> getDevicesSince(OffsetDateTime date) throws Exception
      Get the devices from DB-API that were changed since an optional date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of start of modifications to fecth. May be null, in wich case fetches all devices.
      Returns:
      The List<Json> of devices that were changed since date.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the fetching failed.

    • getConnectionsSince

      public List<Connection> getConnectionsSince(OffsetDateTime date, List<ConnectionProtocol> protocols) throws Exception
      Get the connections from DB-API that were changed since an optional date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of start of modifications to fecth. May be null, in wich case fetches all connections.
      Returns:
      The List<Json> of connections that were changed since date.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the fetching failed.

    • getDeletedDevicesSince

      public List<Pair<String,OffsetDateTime>> getDeletedDevicesSince(OffsetDateTime date) throws Exception
      Get the deleted devices from DB-API that were changed since an optional date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of start of deletions to fecth. May be null, in wich case fetches all deletions.
      Returns:
      The List<String> of device uuids that were deleted since date.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the fetching failed.

    • getDeletedCpeItemsSince

      public List<Pair<String,OffsetDateTime>> getDeletedCpeItemsSince(OffsetDateTime date, int limit, int offset) throws Exception
      Get the deleted CPE Items from DB-API that were changed since an optional date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of start of deletions to fecth. May be null, in wich case fetches all deletions.
      Returns:
      The List<String> of CPE Item uuids that were deleted since date.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the fetching failed.

    • getDeletedMicrosoftKbsSince

      public List<Pair<String,OffsetDateTime>> getDeletedMicrosoftKbsSince(OffsetDateTime date, int limit, int offset) throws Exception
      Get the deleted Microsoft KBs from DB-API that were changed since an optional date.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of start of deletions to fecth. May be null, in wich case fetches all deletions.
      Returns:
      The List<String> of Microsoft KB uuids that were deleted since date.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the fetching failed.

    • fetchDevices

      public List<Device> fetchDevices(List<String> uuids) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException, TimeoutException
      Fetch a list of devices from DB-API.
      Parameters:
      uuids - The List<Integer> of IDs of devices to retrieve from DB-API
      Returns:
      The List<Json> of devices fetched from DB-API
      Throws:
      ExecutionException - If the fetch failed.
      InterruptedException - If the connection with DB-API was interrupted.
      TimeoutException - If the connection with DB-API times out.

    • fetchConnections

      public List<Connection> fetchConnections(List<Integer> ids, List<ConnectionProtocol> protocols) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException, TimeoutException
      Fetch a list of connections from DB-API.
      Parameters:
      ids - The List<Integer> of IDs of connections to retrieve from DB-API
      Returns:
      The List<Json> of connections fetched from DB-API
      Throws:
      ExecutionException - If the fetch failed.
      InterruptedException - If the connection with DB-API was interrupted.
      TimeoutException - If the connection with DB-API times out.

    • fetchDiscoveryProtocols

      public List<ConnectionProtocol> fetchDiscoveryProtocols() throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException, TimeoutException
      Fetch the list discovery protocols from DB-API.
      Returns:
      The List<Json> of protocols fetched from DB-API
      Throws:
      ExecutionException - If the fetch failed.
      InterruptedException - If the connection with DB-API was interrupted.
      TimeoutException - If the connection with DB-API times out.

    • createDiscoveryProtocol

      public void createDiscoveryProtocol(EntityHttpConnection entityHttpConnection) throws Exception
      Create a discovery protocol in DB-API. Used when updating an HTTP template.
      Parameters:
      entityHttpConnection - The created HTTP template.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the creation failed.

    • updateDiscoveryProtocol

      public void updateDiscoveryProtocol(EntityHttpConnection entityHttpConnection) throws Exception
      Update a discovery protocol in DB-API. Used when updating an HTTP template.
      Parameters:
      entityHttpConnection - The updated HTTP template.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the update failed.

    • deleteDiscoveryProtocol

      public void deleteDiscoveryProtocol(String uuid) throws Exception
      Delete a discovery protocol in DB-API. Used when deleting an HTTP template.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The UUID of the HTTP template to delete.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the deletion failed.

    • deleteDiscoveryProtocolsList

      public void deleteDiscoveryProtocolsList(List<String> uuids)

    • getDiscoveryProtocolByTemplateId

      public ConnectionProtocol getDiscoveryProtocolByTemplateId(String id)

    • notifyScanStarted

      public int notifyScanStarted(OffsetDateTime startDate)
      Inform DB-API that a scan has started.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The starting time of the scan.
      Returns:
      The id attributed by DB-API to the scan object.

    • notifyScanStarted

      public int notifyScanStarted()
      Inform DB-API that a scan just started.
      Returns:
      The id attributed by DB-API to the scan object.

    • notifyScanFinished

      public void notifyScanFinished(ScanEntity scan) throws Exception
      Notify DB-API that a scan is finished.
      Parameters:
      scan - The scan that ended.
      Throws:
      ExecutionException - If the sending failed.
      InterruptedException - If the sending was interrupted.
      TimeoutException - If the sending timed out.
      Exception - If received an unexpected HTTP status code (ie. != 200) or if the JSON was malformed.

    • notifySynchronisationEnded

      public void notifySynchronisationEnded(ScanEntity scan) throws Exception
      Notify DB-API we have sent all the CPE Items discovered by a scan.
      Parameters:
      scan - The scan that ended.
      Throws:
      ExecutionException - If the sending failed.
      InterruptedException - If the sending was interrupted.
      TimeoutException - If the sending timed out.
      Exception - If received an unexpected HTTP status code (i.e. != 200) or if the JSON was malformed.

    • notifyNoNewCpe

      public void notifyNoNewCpe()
      Send a request to DB-API to inform it the current scan provided no new CPE Item.

    • cancelAllScans

      public void cancelAllScans()
      Cancel all scan events in DB-API.

    • getOrganizationName

      public String getOrganizationName()
      Get the organization name from DB-API.
      Returns:
      The organization name. Defaults to "None" if the request failed.

      public String getMqttTopicPrefix()

    • sendNewDevicesToScanner

      public JsonApiResponse sendNewDevicesToScanner(ScanApiHandler scanApiHandler)
      Handle the changes in the devices on DB-API.
      Parameters:
      scanApiHandler - The interface of the scanner's API.
      Returns:
      A Json containing the result (success or failure).

      Exception

      public int requestBsonExportID(ExportQuery exportQuery) throws Exception
      Request a new BSON export ID from DB-API.
      Returns:
      The new BSON export ID.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed.

    • notifyExportFinished

      public void notifyExportFinished(int id, ExportQuery exportQuery) throws Exception
      Update the status of an export query in DB-API.
      Parameters:
      exportQuery - The export query to update.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the request failed.
